fact_nuggets.text: Heavy Metal (Japanese: Heavy Metal) is an Ability introduced in Generation V.

Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Doubles the weight of the Pokemon with this Ability. Autotomize is applied before other weight-modifying effects, including Heavy Metal. Heavy Metal is the only effect that can cause a Pokemon's weight to exceed 999.9 kg. This has no effect on the Heavy Ball , which uses the Pokemon's species' weight rather than its current weight. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Heavy Metal has no effect outside of battle.
